item.title: AI-Driven Defect Detection with Machine Vision
item.description: Is your quality control still manual? It’s time for a reality check. 🚗💡 The ASQ Automotive Division of the American Society for Quality is proud to present an exciting series of high-impact webinars featuring Global Quality and Industry Experts from across the manufacturing landscape. Traditional inspection is slow, prone to error, and costly. But the future of manufacturing isn't just about automation—it’s about intelligence. Join us for an exclusive webinar hosted by the ASQ - World Headquarters Automotive Division to dive deep into how hashtag # AI and hashtag # Machine hashtag # Vision are transforming defect detection into a proactive, data-driven strategy.

item.title: AI for NDT Professionals: Improving Accuracy, Speed, and Reliability | ASNT Education
item.description: Explore how AI is transforming NDT through automated defect recognition in digital radiography. This webinar highlights practical implementation strategies, real-world case studies, and key benefits such as faster analysis, improved accuracy, and reduced costs. Designed for technicians, Level III supervisors, and managers.

item.title: Beyond Defect Detection: The New Rules of AI Quality Control in 2026
item.description: A recap of Zetamotion’s first 2026 webinar on machine vision trends, the data bottleneck, synthetic data, edge AI, and what it takes to scale AI quality control beyond pilots.

item.title: Webinar on Tackling Quality Control with AI Vision - Elementary
item.description: Many manufacturers are exploring AI for quality control—but getting it working in production is still a challenge. From manual labeling to complex setup, traditional AI workflows can slow teams down.

item.title: Live Webinar - AI for Automatic Inspection: Fasteners and a New Standard in Quality Control
item.description: Register for the IFI webinar to learn about AI-powered vision systems transforming fastener inspection and defect detection.

item.title: GelSight Webinar - Surface Inspection & Automatic Defect Detection
item.description: Join us as we demonstrate the latest software capabilities and surface characterisation: New defect detection analysis function Radius of curvature Surface roughness Profile roughness Dimensional measurements Particle detection This is a recording of the main webinar demonstration.

item.title: Webinar - AI-Driven Automation for Power T&D Line Inspection, Defect Detection
item.description: Discover how AI is revolutionizing power line inspections, enabling utilities to predict failures before they happen and prevent costly outages.
